purpose: Judge whether one title, body, and Frame image turn a creator-owned pre-trade idea into a truthful, memorable, visually legible expression.

score_scale.3: clear and useful at first read
score_scale.4: distinctive, precise, and stronger than the creator expected

dimensions.question: Does the result preserve and sharpen the creator's actual judgment without replacing it with generic neutrality?
When relevant Cues exist, were at most one aligned and one contrasting or adjacent viewpoint used as optional thought anchors, with only creator-adopted additions entering the final meaning?
Were the exact public copy, asset, direction, deadline, human settlement rule, and visual job confirmed before rendering, and do the pixels still match that frozen decision?
Does every observed statement follow from the displayed data, while hypotheses remain visibly creator-owned?
Does the geometry itself explain the idea rather than merely decorate prose?
At a roughly 360-pixel phone feed width, can a reader identify the evidence relationship, creator interpretation, and next watch in three seconds?
Is every visible string complete, collision-free, and readable without ellipsis or unexplained abbreviation?
Does unresolved time have dates and checkable conditions, with any counter-signal phrased as a neutral watch or reason to reassess rather than a hard invalidation or fake forecast?
Could this visual plausibly belong to this creator and idea rather than any ticker with swapped colors?
Does the design family, narrative placement, type system, and material behavior fit this idea's reader question instead of acting as a reusable skin?
Would the image deliver one fast cognitive reward in a pre-trade feed and leave one memorable relationship behind without engagement bait?
Does the image say only what the geometry cannot, with the tested observation attached to evidence instead of repeated in a summary block?

Does the body use the smallest complete, idea-specific shape—with varied sentence and paragraph weight—rather than repeating a fixed paragraph count, equal blocks, or an obligatory invalidation close?
Does one prominent, creator-specific line make the user's distinctive intuition feel recognized and better expressed without generic praise or hype?

Is the sole 2488 x 1056 publication master authored against a 622 x 264 mobile box with one dominant geometry, at most three reader-essential groups, primary type at least 20 px, and secondary essential labels at least 16 px?
If this is a reroll, does it provide a materially different truthful silhouette while preserving the exact meaning lock, evidence, direction, and horizon?

hard_failures: visible text is truncated or replaced by ellipsis
an observed sentence is not supported by the rendered data
a creator hypothesis is presented as measured fact
another creator's Cue is treated as proof, consensus, or current-creator ownership without explicit adoption
a clearly framed creator inference is rejected merely because the causal bridge is not itself an established fact
a future market price path or uncalibrated probability is fabricated
the image repeats the title or body without adding analytical information
a chart image falls back to three paragraph-like observation, mechanism, and implication summaries
the emotional language is generic praise, hype, certainty, or a call to trade
the visual claims an official index when it is only a creator-defined basket
a visual-only reroll differs only by palette or typography while keeping the same reading silhouette
the publication or expanded Frame hides a derived basket's components, weights, basis, coverage, or limitations

the publication master is a dense desktop downscale, needs zoom at 622 x 264, contains more than three competing reader-essential groups, or falls below the 20 px primary / 16 px secondary essential type floors
pixels are rendered before the exact copy and settlement Meaning Lock is confirmed, or a post-confirmation semantic or deadline change reuses stale pixels
a layout-only reroll changes facts, evidence, direction, horizon, or claim-state typing
public copy or image prints correction-first headings such as invalidation, falsification condition, I admit I was wrong, or their locale equivalents
the primary relationship cannot be identified within five seconds
